name: Royal Silk Evening Gown
description: A stunning royal silk evening gown crafted from premium Italian silk. Features a flattering A-line silhouette with intricate hand-stitched embellishments. Perfect for galas, red carpets, and special occasions.

name: Classic Cotton Kurta Set
description: Elegant cotton kurta set with traditional embroidery work. Includes matching palazzo pants and dupatta. Comfortable fabric suitable for all seasons. A must-have for your ethnic wardrobe.

name: Premium Slim Fit Blazer
description: Premium slim-fit blazer crafted from fine wool blend. Features modern notch lapels, two-button closure, and functional pockets. Ideal for business meetings and formal events.

name: Denim Casual Jacket
description: Classic denim jacket with a modern twist. Features a comfortable relaxed fit, brass button closure, and chest pockets. Layer it over any outfit for an effortlessly cool look.

name: Embroidered Bridal Lehenga
description: Exquisite bridal lehenga with intricate zardozi embroidery. Heavy embellished blouse with matching dupatta. Made with premium fabric and handcrafted details for your special day.

name: Cashmere Winter Shawl
description: Luxurious pure cashmere shawl, handwoven with traditional patterns. Lightweight yet incredibly warm. A timeless accessory for the winter season.

name: Floral Print Maxi Dress
description: Beautiful floral print maxi dress with flowing silhouette. Features a V-neckline, adjustable waist tie, and side pockets. Perfect for brunches and outdoor events.

name: Sequin Party Top
description: Eye-catching sequin party top with a relaxed fit. Fully lined with premium quality sequins that catch the light beautifully. Pair with jeans or a skirt for a night out.

name: Tailored Office Trousers
description: Perfectly tailored office trousers in premium stretch fabric. Features a high-waisted design, pressed creases, and a comfortable fit that moves with you all day.

name: Lawn Printed 3-Piece Suit
description: Premium lawn 3-piece suit with vibrant digital prints. Includes shirt, trousers, and chiffon dupatta. Breathable fabric perfect for summer days.

name: Wool Blend Overcoat
description: Sophisticated wool blend overcoat with double-breasted closure. Features a classic collar, side pockets, and a knee-length cut. A wardrobe essential for cold weather.

name: Designer Bridal Gown
description: Stunning designer bridal gown with delicate lace detailing. Features a sweetheart neckline, cathedral train, and button-back closure. Make your dream wedding a reality.
